items.title: Turning in an Andrew Nembhard night; he's got 23 through 3 and Canada cruising 83-60 over Puerto Rico.
items.author: Doug Smith
items.body_excerpt:
Turning in an Andrew Nembhard night; he's got 23 through 3 and Canada cruising 83-60 over Puerto Rico.

Nembhard's particularly nasty step-back 3 after crossing over a defender was the "ooooooh" shot of the night

items.title: Andrew Nembhard just hit a crossover, stepback 3. Insane stuff.
items.author: Eric Koreen
items.body_excerpt: Andrew Nembhard just hit a crossover, stepback 3. Insane stuff.

items.title: Ethan Thompson (4/4 from deep) and Andrew Nembhard (3/4) have combined for 7 of the 11 made threes in Canada-Puerto Rico so far.
items.author: Tony East

items.title: Pacers guard Andrew Nembhard has been named to Canada’s Senior Men’s National Team training camp roster ahead of upcoming FIBA Men’s World Cup Qualifiers.
